2.anchor: though you are small among the clans

6.anchor: the land of Nimrod with drawn sword.

14.anchor: I will uproot from among you your Asherah poles
14.note: That is, wooden symbols of the goddess Asherah

12.note: sounds like the Hebrew for bitter.

7.note: Or Is the Spirit of the Lord

9.anchor: “Heed the rod and the One who appointed it.
9.note: The meaning of the Hebrew for this line is uncertain.

10.note: An ephah was a dry measure.

13.note: Or Therefore, I will make you ill and destroy you; / I will ruin

14.anchor: your stomach will still be empty.
14.note: The meaning of the Hebrew for this word is uncertain.
Or You will press toward birth but not give birth, / and what you bring to birth

16.anchor: you will bear the scorn of the nations.
16.note: Septuagint; Hebrew scorn due my people

14.note: Or in the middle of Carmel
